Using impacket-secretsdump

impacket-secretsdump performs DCSync by using the Active Directory replication protocol to request credential data from a Domain Controller. It can retrieve NTLM hashes, Kerberos keys, and other credential material without directly accessing the NTDS.dit database.

Advantages

Extracts credentials remotely without accessing NTDS.dit directly.

Disadvantages

Requires replication privileges and is highly detectable by security monitoring solutions.

Dump User Hash Use Privileged User For DCSync

impacket-secretsdump -just-dc-user dave corp.com/jeffadmin:"BrouhahaTungPerorateBroom2023\!"@192.168.50.70
